sections.paragraph:
Original: מהר

Transliteration: mâhar

Phonetic: maw-har'

BDB Definition:

  1. to obtain or acquire by paying purchase price, give a dowry
    1. (Qal) to obtain in exchange

Origin: a primitive root (perhaps rather the same as H4116 through the idea of readiness in assent)

TWOT entry: 1153

Part(s) of speech: Verb
